gt_sql: SELECT T1.fastestLap FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 on T1.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008 AND T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton'
pred_sql:
SELECT r.fastestLapTime AS fastestLap
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
  AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND ra.year = 2008
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';
question: Which was the fastest lap for Lewis Hamilton in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
